title: packagers need the varlink generated file

comments.body: @baude Should we also remove the varlink generate dependency from the Makefile targets?
@baude Can you add the generated file to https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/master/.tool/lint#L45 to disable linting it?
Or in the `find` statement above in the same file that locates files to test.

:pushpin: Commit 9deee9a has been approved by `baude`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
